branding.logo_concept: The 'Ceylon Canvas' logo employs a 'Quiet Luxury' approach. It features a minimalist geometric monogram where two interlocking, stylized 'C's gracefully overlap. The curves subtly evoke the shape of an unfolding lotus flower (a deeply rooted symbol of Sri Lankan heritage) and the fluid sweep of an elegant painter's brushstroke. Rendered in 'Ceylon Gold' against a 'Midnight Slate' background, the design avoids overt clichés. It feels architectural, gallery-ready, and investment-grade, appealing directly to high-net-worth international collectors.
branding.navbar_appearance: Left-aligned minimalist monogram + 'Ceylon Canvas' wordmark in Cormorant Garamond with wide letter-spacing (tracking-widest). Uses a premium Glassmorphism background (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with a subtle 1px bottom border (border-white/10) to separate it from the artwork.
branding.favicon_appearance: The standalone interlocking 'C's (the lotus/brushstroke monogram) in gold on a stark dark background. It relies on clean, high-contrast geometry to remain fully legible and striking at 16x16px and 32x32px.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The 'Bento' Grid Protocol - Mode A (Tetris) for artwork showcases. Uses wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12) and radical asymmetry. Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly to allow the art to breathe.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to maintain a sharp, gallery-frame aesthetic.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10
surfaces.cards: Flat background (bg-[#121212]), 1px subtle border (border-white/5), no shadow. On hover: border-white/20 and slight image scale transform.

components_instructions.navigation: Ensure desktop has visible links. Do not hide behind a hamburger menu on desktop. Use smooth hover states for links (opacity change).
components_instructions.buttons: Minimalist rectangular buttons. Primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#F3E5AB]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5.
components_instructions.images: Hero images max overlay bg-black/40. Product images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.

image_urls.description: Minimalist luxury logo design for Ceylon Canvas featuring interlocking C's resembling a lotus/brushstroke in gold on charcoal.
Minimalist luxury logo design for Ceylon Canvas featuring interlocking C's resembling a lotus/brushstroke in dark charcoal on bone white.
Premium art gallery interior with paintings on walls, perfect for hero section overlay.
Luxurious art gallery lobby, sets the mood for high-end international collectors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts. Utilize Framer Motion for smooth entrances and Lenis for momentum scrolling. Emphasize 'Quiet Luxury' with stark typography contrasts, deep charcoal backgrounds, and gold accents. Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
